name: n8n Agent Orchestrator v3 - Claude Code Parity
description: Upgrade the Universal Agent Orchestrator to match and exceed Claude Code VS Code extension capabilities, utilizing n8n's new Human-in-the-Loop features

stories.title: Add Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) for Tool Approvals
stories.description: Implement n8n's new HITL capabilities to require human approval before executing destructive or sensitive tools. Use the Chat node's 'Send and Wait for Response' operation.
acceptance_criteria: Add Chat Trigger node as alternative entry point
Before file_delete, git_push, rm commands - pause and wait for approval
Use buttons for structured approval (Approve/Deny/Modify)
Set timeout limits (default 5 minutes)
Route approvals to Telegram via existing notification setup
Log approval/denial in Google Sheets
stories.checkpoint_reason: Core HITL functionality - verify approval flow works before proceeding

stories.title: Add Grep/Search Tool
stories.description: Add ripgrep-like search capability to find content across files
acceptance_criteria: Add /search/grep endpoint to Python Bridge API
Support regex patterns
Support file type filtering (--type js, --type py)
Support context lines (-A, -B, -C)
Limit results to prevent overwhelming responses
Route through Tool Router in n8n workflow

stories.title: Add Glob File Pattern Tool
acceptance_criteria: Add /files/glob endpoint to Python Bridge API
Support patterns like **/*.py, src/**/*.ts
Return file paths sorted by modification time
Support path filtering
Route through Tool Router in n8n workflow

stories.title: Add Web Search Tool
stories.description: Add web search capability using available APIs
acceptance_criteria: Add web_search tool to available tools
Use available search API (Serper, Brave, or scraping)
Return structured search results
Include source URLs
Add to Tool Router
stories.checkpoint_reason: Search tools complete - verify grep, glob, web_search work

stories.title: Add Plan Mode
stories.description: Implement plan mode where agent creates a plan and waits for approval before executing
acceptance_criteria: Add plan_mode flag to request config
When enabled, agent first outputs a plan
Use HITL to get plan approval
Only proceed with execution after approval
Allow plan modification via chat

stories.title: Add Todo Tracking
stories.description: Implement todo list tracking for complex multi-step tasks
acceptance_criteria: Add todo_write tool for agent to track progress
Store todos in session state
Include todo status in final response
Support pending/in_progress/completed states
Log todos to Google Sheets

stories.title: Add Chat-Based Interface
stories.description: Add interactive chat interface using n8n Chat Trigger
acceptance_criteria: Add Chat Trigger node as entry point
Support multi-turn conversations
Maintain session context across messages
Show agent thinking/tool usage in real-time
Support conversation history
stories.checkpoint_reason: Interactive features complete - verify chat interface works

stories.title: Add Session Resume/Checkpoint
stories.description: Allow resuming interrupted sessions from last checkpoint
acceptance_criteria: Store full session state in Google Sheets on each iteration
Add resume endpoint to webhook
Load previous state when session_id provided with resume=true
Support explicit checkpoints for complex tasks
Show session history on resume

stories.title: Add Background Task Support
stories.description: Allow long-running tasks to execute in background with status checks
acceptance_criteria: Add background=true flag to request config
Return task_id immediately for background tasks
Add /status/{task_id} endpoint for checking progress
Send Telegram notification on completion
Support abort/cancel for background tasks
stories.checkpoint_reason: All core features complete - full system test

stories.title: Documentation and Testing
stories.description: Update documentation and create test suite
acceptance_criteria: Update docs/AGENT-ORCHESTRATOR-GUIDE.md with all new features
Create test workflow for each tool
Document HITL approval flow
Create quick-start examples
Update memory notes in CLAUDE.md
